entry.title: New GWAC GS06F0334Z awarded to CATAPULT TECHNOLOGY LIMITED for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS REG 6 SMALL BUSINESS ACQUISITION GWAC AND NON-GWAC CENTER

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: FEDERAL SUPPLY SERVICE GOVERNMENT WIDE ACQUISITION CONTRACT

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:extentCompeted.description: FULL AND OPEN COMPETITION AFTER EXCLUSION OF SOURCES
